zh.Kentwell Hall, Long Melford, Suffolk, En: 英國英格蘭素福爾可朗 梅爾福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Warin FitzHugh於大約1270年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可朗 梅爾福德時，他的父親Hugh FitzHenry14歲，母親Albreda Steyngrave27歲。他和Maria Schwaban至少有1個女兒。他去世於大約1343年在英國素福爾可享年75歲。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Warin FitzHugh was born about 1270, in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh FitzHenry, was 14 and his mother, Albreda Steyngrave, was 27. He had at least 1 daughter with Maria Schwaban. He died about 1343, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Warin FitzHugh est né environ 1270, à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh FitzHenry, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Albreda Steyngrave, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Maria Schwaban. Il est décédé environ 1343, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Warin FitzHughが約1270年にイギリスイギリススフォルクロング メルフォードで生まれた時，父Hugh FitzHenryは14歳，母Albreda Steyngraveは27歳であった。彼はMaria Schwabanとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1343年にイギリススフォルクで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Warin FitzHugh(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh FitzHenry(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda Steyngrave(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Maria Schwaban(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1343년 영국 수폴크에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Warin FitzHugh родился около 1270 г. в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh FitzHenry было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Albreda Steyngrave, 27. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Maria Schwaban. Он умер около 1343 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.
